title.sl: Stojalo za svedre z magnetnim hrbtom

short.en: Stepped rack for HSS bits 1.0–10.0 mm with neodymium magnets that stick to the toolbox lid.
short.sl: Stopničasto stojalo za HSS svedre 1,0–10,0 mm z neodimovimi magneti, ki se prilepijo na pokrov orodjarne.

description.en: 0.5 mm-step holes in PLA take the bits with a friction fit; four 8×3 mm magnets press into hex pockets on the back. Sticks to a steel toolbox lid and never gets buried under wrenches again.
description.sl: Luknje s korakom 0,5 mm v PLA z drsnim ujemom za svedre; štirje magneti 8×3 mm se zaskočijo v šestrobne žepe na hrbtu. Prilepi se na jekleni pokrov orodjarne in nikoli več ne tone pod ključi.
